export_skill_name_error: Invalid format. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
export_skill_description_placeholder: Default to app introduction, leave empty if no introduction
folder_delete_disabled_tip: Cannot delete: skills inside have linked apps
confirm_delete_tip: Are you sure you want to delete this Skill?
custom_skill_desc: Intelligently generate skill outlines and frameworks by describing skill requirements
skill_requirement_tooltip_example:
Goal:
Automatically generate meeting minutes from meeting notes.

Process:
1. Identify the meeting topic and participants
2. Extract key discussion points
3. Organize clear conclusions and decisions
4. Extract follow-up action items and note the responsible person (if any)

Requirements:
1. Output in structured format
2. Include: meeting topic, participants, discussion points, decisions, action items
3. Content should be concise and clear, avoiding redundancy
import_skill_max_size_tip: Upload up to {{maxCount}} file at a time, max file size: {{maxSize}}
move_skill_hint: After moving, the selected skill/folder will inherit the permission settings of the new folder.
copy_skill_confirm: The system will create a skill with the same configuration for you, but the permissions will not be copied. Please confirm!
exit_tips: Your changes have not been saved. "Exit directly" will not save your edits.
skill_select_limit_tip: Reached the limit of 100 associated Skills per app
editor_no_file: No files in the skill package
editor_select_file_edit: Select a file on the left to start editing
editor_confirm_delete_content: Delete this file/directory? This directly updates the current version's package in MinIO.
editor_confirm_rename_dirty: Target has unsaved changes; renaming will lose them. Continue?
editor_stale_detected: Files were updated by another session. Refresh to see the latest content.
preview_sync_failed_title: Failed to sync sandbox; this preview may reflect older files
permission.des.manage: Can manage Agent Skill and collaborators
